_comment: Allowlist of KNOWN pyte crash signatures already documented in ../BUGS/. fuzz_pyte.py treats these as expected and fails only on NEW signatures. Remove an entry once the corresponding defect is fixed upstream so the fuzzer starts gating it. Signatures are 'ExcType|file:function|normalized-message'.

bugs.BUG-A: extra CSI parameters -> handler TypeError (too many positional args)
bugs.BUG-D: VPA / DSR under DECOM without margins -> AssertionError

signatures: TypeError|streams.py:_parser_fsm|Screen.F() takes N positional arguments but N were given
TypeError|streams.py:_parser_fsm|Screen.F() takes from N to N positional arguments but N were
UnboundLocalError|screens.py:erase_in_display|cannot access local variable 'X' where it is not associated
UnboundLocalError|screens.py:erase_in_line|cannot access local variable 'X' where it is not associated
